mission.title: weaviate: [Feature Request] Add "Not" operator in filter to support "Not Like" etc. in Get queries
mission.description: [Feature Request] Add "Not" operator in filter to support "Not Like" etc. in Get queries. Requested by 79+ users.

steps.title: Check current weaviate deployment
steps.description:
Verify your weaviate version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/name=weaviate
helm list -n weaviate 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working weaviate installation.

steps.title: Review weaviate configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant weaviate configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/name=weaviate
kubectl get configmap -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=weaviate
```
It looks like a previously faulty not operator was removed: https://github.com/weaviate/weaviate/pull/3360

But I can't see any way to filter a search by excluding some matching criteria.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [Feature Request] Add "Not" operator in filter to support…
steps.description:
### What's being changed:
https://github.com/weaviate/weaviate/issues/3683
The three row_reader classes have duplicate codes, can further DRY the code in a future refactor 

### Review checklist
```yaml
const response = await client.graphql
  .get()
  .withClassName('Snippet')
  .withFields('text')
  .withWhere({
    path: ['url'],
    operator: 'Like',
    valueText: 'https://example.org*',
  })
  .do();
console.log(response);
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/name=weaviate
kubectl get events -n weaviate --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[Feature Request] Add "Not" operator in filter to support…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
### What's being changed:
https://github.com/weaviate/weaviate/issues/3683
The three row_reader classes have duplicate codes, can further DRY the code in a future refactor 

### Review checklist

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with weaviate installed or the issue environment reproducible.
